Solution

## Evaluate Fault Currents With Short Circuit Analysis

Analyze the critical safety measures and system vulnerabilities, while validating equipment specifications by analyzing the power flow through the network. Care Labs helps companies maintain a reliable and secure network in Indian workplaces.

Support

## Potent Support For Analyzing Power System’s Capability

At Care Labs, we perform comprehensive fault analysis to identify the weak points in the system

Technical Support:

Care Labs team uses ETAP to perform fault analysis and recommend the best safety measures and upgrades.

Safety And Compliance Support:

Our short circuit analysis reports offer proactive safety measures and comply with standards of safety like IEEE, IEC, and other Indian Standards.

Technology

## ETAP- The Smart Choice For Fault Analysis

For short circuit analysis in India, Care Labs evaluates the data collected for various electrical equipment in the facility.
